shortForecast: Light Rain Likely then Light Snow Likely
name: Today
detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 8am, then rain likely between 8am and 4pm, then snow likely. Cloudy. High near 54, with temperatures falling to around 34 in the afternoon. West wind 7 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.
